arts.ttl: Guardiola’s astonishing interview before Liverpool - City: “I would love to lose the Premier League”
arts.sum: After five games without a win, Manchester City coach Pep Guardiola is facing the worst crisis of his coaching career. And it comes right before a crucial Premier League clash against Liverpool at Anfield, a game that could leave them 11 points behind the Reds.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester City: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from 5.30pm GMT kick-off Have any thoughts? Send John an email “I don’t sleep as good as when I won every game. I’m the same person as four Premier Leagues in a row and in that situation, I have the same doubts. Now I want to be closer to the players, because I know they are suffering, I know they are thinking: ‘Oh God, how we were not able to win that game against Feyenoord?’ Or: ‘Why don’t we score when we had the chance to score against Spurs?’ They are suffering. What can I do, blame them? Absolutely not.” Plenty of previews for this game. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Nev: City game is the tipping point for Liverpool's title challenge
arts.sum: Gary Neville and Jamie Carragher look ahead to the huge clash at the top of the table between Liverpool and Manchester City

arts.ttl: Liverpool learn cruel Conor Bradley injury timeframe
arts.sum: Liverpool right-back Conor Bradley faces six weeks out due to a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United injury latest as Eddie Howe dealt major scare ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to face Newcastle United in the Premier League on Wednesday night and the hosts could be without a key name

arts.ttl: Man United OPEN talks over beating Liverpool to world class forward for Ruben Amorim’s first signing
arts.sum: Manchester United have reportedly had first contacts over the potential transfer of Eintracht Frankfurt forward Omar Marmoush. The Egypt international looks like one of the most in-form attacking players in Europe at the moment, scoring 15 goals in 18 games in all competitions so far this season. arts.ttl: English club looking to raid Liverpool for midfielder with just one start under Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool midfielder Tyler Morton has been linked with a move away from the club in recent weeks. Sheffield United are reportedly prepared to provide him with an exit route, as per Alan Nixon. arts.ttl: Sky Sports PUNDITS are forced to provide commentary for Chelsea vs Aston Villa clash from Anfield - after Stamford Bridge audio cuts out
arts.sum: A major technical hitch at Stamford Bridge led to the audio cutting out, scrambling host David Jones into an impromptu segment live on air.

arts.ttl: Man City learn final FIFA Club World Cup opponent as draw looms and Real Madrid question remains
arts.sum: Manchester City have learned their final potential opponent at the FIFA Club World Cup in the United States next summer.
